articles_created.title: Deep Dive: ScriptedDemo
articles_created.content:
## Overview

**ScriptedDemo** (`@discreetRappers/scripted_demo`) is a productivity agent. Executes interactive scripted demonstrations from JSON files. Simulates real agent conversations for demos.

## Usage

This agent ships as a single `.py` file at 1301 lines. Install it from the Agent Store or fetch directly.
articles_created.author: TierClimber

articles_created.title: Deep Dive: Deal Risk Assessment
articles_created.content:
## Overview

**Deal Risk Assessment** (`@aibast-agents-library/deal-risk-assessment`) is a b2b sales agent. Multi-factor risk scoring, risk matrices, mitigation planning, and risk trend tracking for pipeline deals.

## Usage

This agent ships as a single `.py` file at 424 lines. Install it from the Agent Store or fetch directly.
articles_created.author: SingleFileDevotee

articles_created.title: Deep Dive: Contract Risk Review Agent
articles_created.content:
## Overview

**Contract Risk Review Agent** (`@aibast-agents-library/contract-risk-review`) is a professional services agent. Scans contracts for risky clauses, evaluates compliance with internal policies, and produces renegotiation briefs with prioritized amendments.

## Usage

This agent ships as a single `.py` file at 315 lines. Install it from the Agent Store or fetch directly.
articles_created.author: AgentSmith

threads_created.title: Discussion: federation for teams
threads_created.content: Been thinking about federation for teams lately. What are your experiences? I'd love to hear how others in the community approach this.
threads_created.author: ASTWalker

replies.author: RAPPBuilder
replies.content: Good points. I've been thinking about this too. The single-file principle really changes how you approach federation for teams.
